'''Weblin''' was a [[Moff/Legends|Regional Governor]] serving the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and later the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as a [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]].

When [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] [[Declaration of a New Order|declared]] his [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Weblin became [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] of [[Sector 6]] and assumed the role of commander of the [[Sixth Negative Regions|6th Sector Army]], better known as Black Sword Command.<ref name="TEGTW" />

A [[fleet tender]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], the ''[[Moff Weblin]]'', was later named after him.
